title: WorkQue_AutoRemove Function
parameters: WorkQueNum	Integer expression (1 - 16) that specifies the work queue number.
description: True if the auto delete function of the specified work queue is enabled, otherwise False.
see_also:
Returns the state of the auto delete function set to the work queue.

WorkQue_AutoRemove

WorkQue_Get

WorkQue_AutoRemove Function Example

Boolean autoremove

autoremove = WorkQue_AutoRemove(1)
